name: Full-flow employee canary
description: Single onboarded company shared across the employee canary suite. The suite drives this company through admin employee onboarding (create+onboard a fresh hire), employee self-onboarding (drive a pre-seeded unfinished employee through the self-serve flow), and termination (terminate a pre-onboarded seed philosopher via the TerminationFlow). One decorated `selfee` employee is needed for self-onboarding; admin onboarding creates its own employee; termination picks a seed employee from the demo because the scenario runner cannot fully transition a decorated employee into onboarding_completed (missing SSN/DOB/W-4/state-tax setup).
